data.body: WS9 (sip-thorn-epoch) LANDED: commit 54fa128fa. cohort field stamped in pass1_chunk/container/isf + both _too_big paths; _slim allowlist; contamination-rate script; docs note. Closed both attestations. 10/11 done (all but WS10). Stack tip 54fa128fa. Next: WS10 docs + rebar explain (LAST) — R-3 invariant, registry-derived guide + parity, explain_criterion across CLI/MCP/library, REBAR_DOCS_URL, coach deep-links. Then land the stacked changes on main.
